executive_summary: Latest updates from 2 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 2 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: UN confirms Gaza security force to include Kazakhstan, Indonesia and Morocco. UK to host talks on mission to reopen Hormuz, says official. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: UN confirms Gaza security force to include Kazakhstan, Indonesia and Morocco
key_developments.detail: The UN has confirmed which countries are to be members of a post-war military force planned for the Gaza Strip . key_developments.headline: UK to host talks on mission to reopen Hormuz, says official
key_developments.detail: Britain and France will chair military talks this week involving around 30 nations to form a coalition to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a UK defence official has told AFP. terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
